channel.title: morning-meals Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh morning-meals posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Quick and Fresh Protein-Packed Avocado Breakfast Bowls for Busy Mornings
item.description: These breakfast bowls combine creamy avocado with tangy yogurt for a fresh, protein-rich start to your day. Super easy to make and perfect when you’re rushing but want something nourishing.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 ripe avocado, peeled and diced
  • 1 cup plain Greek yogurt
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup
  • 2 tablespoons chopped fresh mint
  • 1/4 cup fresh strawberries, sliced
  • 2 tablespoons granola or chopped nuts
  • Pinch of sea salt

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #avocado #plain #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Quick and Fresh Protein-Packed Avocado Breakfast Bowls for Busy Mornings
media:content.media:description: These breakfast bowls combine creamy avocado with tangy yogurt for a fresh, protein-rich start to your day. Super easy to make and perfect when you’re rushing but want something nourishing.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230422512, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, avocado, plain, tablespoon

item.title: Berry Oat Protein Smoothie for a Healthy Morning Boost
item.description: This smoothie blends berries, oats, and protein powder for a filling, nutritious start to your day. The oats add a nice texture and keep you full longer. Great for busy mornings or post-workout fuel!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup mixed frozen berries
  • 1/2 cup rolled oats
  • 1 scoop vanilla protein powder
  • 1 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup
  • 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon
  • Optional: 1 tablespoon chia seeds

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #mixed #rolled #scoop

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Berry Oat Protein Smoothie for a Healthy Morning Boost
media:content.media:description: This smoothie blends berries, oats, and protein powder for a filling, nutritious start to your day. The oats add a nice texture and keep you full longer. Great for busy mornings or post-workout fuel!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230422512, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, mixed, rolled, scoop

item.title: Green Protein Smoothie Bowl with Spinach and Banana: A Fresh Start to Your Day
item.description: This green protein smoothie bowl blends fresh spinach, creamy banana, and plant-based protein for a nutritious breakfast that keeps you energized. Topped with crunchy seeds and berries, it’s perfect for a quick, wholesome morning boost.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups fresh spinach, packed
  • 1 large ripe banana, peeled
  • 1/2 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 1 scoop vanilla plant-based protein powder
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds
  • 1 tablespoon almond butter
  • 1/2 cup frozen pineapple chunks
  • Toppings: sliced banana, fresh berries, granola, pumpkin seeds

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #large #unsweetened

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Green Protein Smoothie Bowl with Spinach and Banana: A Fresh Start to Your Day
media:content.media:description: This green protein smoothie bowl blends fresh spinach, creamy banana, and plant-based protein for a nutritious breakfast that keeps you energized. Topped with crunchy seeds and berries, it’s perfect for a quick, wholesome morning boost.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230422512, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, large, unsweetened

item.title: Cozy Cinnamon Fruit Oatmeal That Starts Your Day Right
item.description: This cinnamon-spiced oatmeal with fresh fruit is my go-to for busy mornings. It’s light but filling, with just the right touch of sweetness. Perfect when you want a warm, comforting breakfast that doesn’t slow you down.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 5 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup rolled oats
  • 2 cups water or milk of choice
  • 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon
  • 1 tablespoon maple syrup or honey
  • 1/2 cup fresh mixed berries (blueberries, strawberries, raspberries)
  • 1 small banana, sliced
  • Pinch of salt

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #rolled #water #teaspoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Cozy Cinnamon Fruit Oatmeal That Starts Your Day Right
media:content.media:description: This cinnamon-spiced oatmeal with fresh fruit is my go-to for busy mornings. It’s light but filling, with just the right touch of sweetness. Perfect when you want a warm, comforting breakfast that doesn’t slow you down.

item.title: Refreshing Berry Smoothie Bowl Topped with Crunchy Almonds and Chia Seeds
item.description: This vibrant berry smoothie bowl is packed with antioxidants and topped with crunchy almonds and chia seeds for a satisfying texture. It’s my favorite way to start busy mornings feeling energized and refreshed.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup frozen mixed berries (blueberries, strawberries, raspberries)
  • 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt, cold
  • 1/2 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds
  • 2 tablespoons sliced almonds
  • 1/4 cup granola (optional)
  • Fresh berries for topping

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #frozen #plain #unsweetened

media:content.media:description: This vibrant berry smoothie bowl is packed with antioxidants and topped with crunchy almonds and chia seeds for a satisfying texture. It’s my favorite way to start busy mornings feeling energized and refreshed.

item.title: Colorful Berry Smoothie Bowl with Granola and Chia Seeds for a Fresh Start
item.description: This vibrant berry smoothie bowl is packed with antioxidants and topped with crunchy granola and chia seeds for extra texture and nutrition. It’s a refreshing breakfast or snack that feels like a treat but fuels your day right.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup frozen mixed berries (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries)
  • 1 frozen banana, sliced
  • 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, plain or vanilla
  • 1/2 cup almond milk (or any milk of choice)
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 1/4 cup granola
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds
  • Fresh berries for topping (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Blueberry Oats Bowl with Greek Yogurt for a Light Protein Boost
item.description: This blueberry oats bowl with creamy Greek yogurt is my morning lifesaver. The fresh berries bring natural sweetness while the protein-rich yogurt keeps me satisfied till lunch. Quick, fresh, and perfect for busy days!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 1

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1/2 cup rolled oats, dry
  • 1/2 cup water or milk (dairy or plant-based)
  • 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, plain and full-fat
  • 1/2 cup fresh blueberries
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds (optional)
  • Pinch of cinnamon

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #rolled #water #greek

item.title: Creamy Peanut Butter Banana Overnight Oats for a Protein-Packed Morning
item.description: This overnight oats recipe is my go-to for busy mornings. The peanut butter adds a rich creaminess and protein boost, while banana keeps it naturally sweet. Prep it the night before and enjoy a grab-and-go breakfast that's both filling and tasty!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup rolled oats
  • 1 cup unsweetened almond milk (or milk of choice)
  • 2 tablespoons peanut butter, creamy
  • 1 medium ripe banana, mashed
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • Pinch of salt

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #rolled #unsweetened #peanut

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: This overnight oats recipe is my go-to for busy mornings. The peanut butter adds a rich creaminess and protein boost, while banana keeps it naturally sweet. Prep it the night before and enjoy a grab-and-go breakfast that's both filling and tasty!

item.title: Creamy Peanut Butter Banana Smoothie Bowl That Keeps You Full All Morning
item.description: This smoothie bowl blends creamy peanut butter with ripe bananas for a protein-packed breakfast. Adding protein powder makes it super filling and energizing. Great for busy mornings when you need a quick, healthy boost!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 1

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 large ripe banana, peeled and sliced
  • 2 tablespoons creamy peanut butter
  • 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, plain and unsweetened
  • 1/2 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 1 scoop vanilla protein powder
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • Toppings: sliced banana, granola, chia seeds, fresh berries

item.title: Protein-Packed Blueberry Smoothie for a Fresh Summer Boost
item.description: This blueberry smoothie blends creamy Greek yogurt with almond butter for a filling, protein-rich start to your day. It’s my go-to quick breakfast or post-workout treat that keeps you energized without feeling heavy.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup frozen blueberries
  • 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, plain and full-fat
  • 2 tablespoons almond butter
  • 1/2 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • A handful of ice cubes (optional)

item.title: Tropical Mango Pineapple Smoothie Bowl for a Quick Energy Boost
item.description: Bright and fresh, this smoothie bowl combines frozen mango and pineapple to create a creamy, dairy-free breakfast or snack. Packed with crunchy seeds for texture, it’s perfect when you need a quick and vibrant energy lift.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup frozen mango chunks
  • 1 cup frozen pineapple chunks
  • 1 ripe banana
  • 1/2 cup coconut water
  • 2 tablespoons chia seeds
  • 1 tablespoon hemp seeds
  • 1 tablespoon shredded coconut (optional)
  • Fresh fruit and granola for topping

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #frozen #banana

item.title: Berry-Packed Overnight Oats with Creamy Greek Yogurt for Busy Mornings
item.description: This overnight oats recipe is a lifesaver for rushed mornings. Creamy Greek yogurt and fresh berries make it both filling and fresh. Just prep it before bed and grab a healthy breakfast on the go!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1/2 cup rolled oats
  • 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, plain and creamy
  • 1/2 cup milk (dairy or plant-based)
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup
  • 1/2 cup mixed fresh berries (blueberries, raspberries, strawberries)
  • 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • Pinch of cinnamon (optional)

item.title: Fluffy Gluten-Free Blueberry Pancakes That Pack a Protein Punch
item.description: These pancakes are my go-to for a quick, healthy breakfast. They’re fluffy, gluten-free, and bursting with fresh blueberries. Plus, they have an extra protein boost to keep you full all morning!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 1/2 cups gluten-free all-purpose flour blend, sifted
  • 2 tablespoons sugar
  • 1 teaspoon baking powder
  • 1/2 teaspoon baking soda
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1 cup buttermilk, room temperature
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 2 tablespoons melted coconut oil or butter
  • 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt
  • 1 cup fresh blueberries, gently rinsed and drained

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #glutenfree #sugar #teaspoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

item.content:encoded:

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

  • 1/3 cup Greek yogurt (plain, full-fat or low-fat)
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup

item.title: Refreshing Berry Smoothie with a Twist of Fresh Mint for Morning Boosts
item.description: This vibrant berry smoothie is my go-to morning pick-me-up—light, refreshing, and packed with antioxidants. Adding fresh mint gives it a bright, unexpected twist. Perfect for busy mornings when you want something healthy and quick!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup mixed berries (fresh or frozen)
  • 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt
  • 1/2 cup almond milk (or any milk of choice)
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup
  • A handful of fresh mint leaves
  • 1/2 banana (optional, for creaminess)
  • Ice cubes (optional, for thickness)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #mixed #plain #almond

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:title: Refreshing Berry Smoothie with a Twist of Fresh Mint for Morning Boosts
media:content.media:description: This vibrant berry smoothie is my go-to morning pick-me-up—light, refreshing, and packed with antioxidants. Adding fresh mint gives it a bright, unexpected twist. Perfect for busy mornings when you want something healthy and quick!

item.title: Creamy Peanut Butter Banana Oatmeal for a Power-Packed Breakfast
item.description: This creamy oatmeal blends peanut butter and ripe banana for natural sweetness and protein. It’s my go-to quick breakfast that fuels busy mornings or workouts without fuss.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 5 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup rolled oats
  • 2 cups water or milk (dairy or plant-based), warmed
  • 1 ripe banana, mashed
  • 2 tablespoons natural peanut butter
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • Pinch of salt
  • 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

media:content.media:title: Creamy Peanut Butter Banana Oatmeal for a Power-Packed Breakfast
media:content.media:description: This creamy oatmeal blends peanut butter and ripe banana for natural sweetness and protein. It’s my go-to quick breakfast that fuels busy mornings or workouts without fuss.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230422512, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, rolled, water, banana

item.title: Hearty Overnight Oatmeal Bowls with Fresh Berries and Crunchy Nuts
item.description: These oatmeal bowls are a powerhouse breakfast loaded with protein and fresh berries. The secret? Soaking the oats overnight for a creamy, dreamy texture. Perfect for busy mornings or a relaxed weekend brunch.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup rolled oats, dry
  • 1 1/2 cups unsweetened almond milk
  • 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, plain
  • 2 tablespoons chia seeds
  • 2 tablespoons honey or maple syrup
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1 cup mixed fresh berries (blueberries, raspberries, strawberries)
  • 1/2 cup chopped mixed nuts (almonds, walnuts, pecans)
  • Pinch of salt

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Berry Smoothie Bowl with Chia Seeds and Crunchy Granola for a Fresh Start
item.description: This berry smoothie bowl is my go-to when I want something fresh but filling. The chia seeds add a nice protein boost, and the granola gives a satisfying crunch. Perfect for mornings or post-workout refuel!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup frozen mixed berries
  • 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt, cold
  • 1/2 cup almond milk, unsweetened
  • 2 tablespoons chia seeds
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup
  • 1/4 cup granola, for topping
  • Fresh berries, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Fresh Tropical Smoothie Bowl with Coconut Water Base for a Bright Start
item.description: This smoothie bowl is bursting with tropical flavors and creamy protein, all blended with refreshing coconut water. It’s perfect for a sunny morning boost or a light post-workout snack. I love how the coconut water adds a subtle sweetness without heaviness.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup frozen mango chunks
  • 1/2 cup frozen pineapple chunks
  • 1 small banana, sliced
  • 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt
  • 1/2 cup coconut water, chilled
  • 1 scoop vanilla protein powder
  • Toppings: fresh sliced kiwi, shredded coconut, chia seeds, granola

item.title: Refreshing Strawberry and Spinach Smoothie Bowl to Start Your Day Right
item.description: This smoothie bowl blends fresh strawberries with vibrant spinach for a refreshing, nutrient-packed breakfast. The secret? A splash of coconut water for a light, tropical twist. Perfect for a quick morning boost or post-workout snack!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup fresh strawberries, hulled
  • 1 cup fresh spinach leaves, packed
  • 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, plain and unsweetened
  • 1/2 cup coconut water
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 1/4 cup granola for topping
  • Fresh strawberry slices and chia seeds for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Easy 30-Minute Chicken Stir Fry That Tastes Like Takeout
item.description: This quick chicken stir fry is my go-to for busy weeknights. Juicy chicken and crisp veggies tossed in a savory sauce come together fast, thanks to a simple marinade that amps up flavor. Perfect when you want something fresh and satisfying without the wait!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, thinly sliced
  • 2 tablespoons soy sauce, divided
  • 1 tablespoon oyster sauce
  • 1 tablespoon cornstarch
  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 1 cup broccoli florets
  • 1 medium carrot, julienned
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 teaspoon grated fresh ginger
  • 1/4 cup chicken broth or water
  • 1 teaspoon sesame oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Cooked rice or noodles, for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

media:content.media:description: This quick chicken stir fry is my go-to for busy weeknights. Juicy chicken and crisp veggies tossed in a savory sauce come together fast, thanks to a simple marinade that amps up flavor. Perfect when you want something fresh and satisfying without the wait!

item.title: Fluffy Buttermilk Pancakes That Melt in Your Mouth Every Time
item.description: These pancakes are my go-to for a cozy weekend morning. The buttermilk adds this amazing tang and fluffiness that’s hard to beat. Perfect with maple syrup and fresh berries!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 1/2 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 3 1/2 teaspoons baking powder
  • 1 teaspoon baking soda
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • 1 tablespoon sugar
  • 1 1/4 cups buttermilk, cold
  • 1 large egg, beaten
  • 3 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted
  • Butter or oil for cooking

👩‍🍳 Instructions

media:content.media:description: These pancakes are my go-to for a cozy weekend morning. The buttermilk adds this amazing tang and fluffiness that’s hard to beat. Perfect with maple syrup and fresh berries!
